title: Public Update on Recent Events at CHAOSS
content:
The CHAOSS project would like to take an opportunity to comment on recent events happening inside our community. On Sunday, March 29, 2026, a co-founder of CHAOSS, Sean Goggins, removed...

The post Public Update on Recent Events at CHAOSS appeared first on CHAOSS.
